basics.name: Ajay Singh Thakur
basics.label: Technical Leader - Mobile
basics.summary: Experienced Mobile Engineer with 10+ years of expertise in designing and developing scalable apps for Apple platforms (iOS, watchOS, macOS, iPadOS) and Android applications. Proven leader in modernizing legacy codebases, implementing robust CI/CD pipelines, and delivering significant quality improvements. Adept at collaborating with cross-functional and distributed teams to drive product enhancements and achieve exceptional business outcomes. Proficient in Swift, Kotlin, SwiftUI, Jetpack Compose, and modern mobile development practices.

work.name: KPIT Technologies
work.summary: Led mobile engineering team on Suzuki Ride Connect and My Triumph projects.
highlights: Led a team of 6 mobile engineers to modernize a legacy codebase by re-architecting a flawed MVVM implementation where views were misused as view model classes.
Introduced SwiftLint incrementally alongside Periphery to eliminate dead code.
Implemented agile practices including daily stand-ups, sprint planning, and retrospectives, enhancing team collaboration and accelerating release cycles.
Trained and mentored two interns who were subsequently retained as full-time software engineers.
Drove improvements in app quality, increasing the CSAT rating from 2.75 to 4.7.
Established streamlined CI/CD pipelines for both the iOS app and XCFramework, with frameworks stored on a Nexus Repository.
Collaborated with designers and project managers to propose and implement client change requests that enhanced product quality.
Developed Turn-by-Turn Navigation and built an XCFramework for an IP Navigation engine.

work.name: CloudMoyo India Pvt. Ltd
work.summary: Worked on Viddl App and Viddl WebApp — a TikTok-like video creation and consumption platform.
highlights: Developed robust video creation and consumption modules enabling users to stitch multiple videos together into cohesive content.
Contributed to both iOS and Android applications; initially focused on stabilizing the iOS app and later extended efforts to the Android platform.
Collaborated with a globally distributed team with key members based in the US and Romania to ensure seamless cross-functional communication.
Integrated Microsoft Authentication and implemented features such as pagination and LRU caching to optimize performance.

work.name: Innodeed Systems Pvt. Ltd
work.summary: Worked on Cut Paste Photos, Read4Me, Music Editor, and the Dexati Ecosystem.
highlights: Developed image segmentation features, custom image effects, and implemented in-app purchases.
Created a custom reader mode using WKWebView for the Read4Me project.
Contributed to projects for Dexati, supporting an ecosystem with over 925 million downloads across apps.

work.name: TechPhant Consulting Group
work.summary: Led engineering team on HWW iOS/Android app and Salmon Journey Game.
highlights: Led a 5-member engineering team.
Built the HWW app in React Native.
Developed Salmon Journey game using HTML5 and Pixi.js.

work.name: TechPhant Consulting Group
work.summary: Part of mobile engineering team working on MM2 View iOS app and SG-Movie iOS app.
highlights: Part of a 2-member mobile engineering team.
Contributed to the MM2 View app.
Developed the SG-Movie app for the Singapore region.
